name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Atlantic Beach, FL's Value Pawn & Jewelry at 1099 Atlantic Blvd offers quick cash loans, gold buying, and jewelry sales.
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates at 1099 Atlantic Blvd in Atlantic Beach, FL, in a standalone storefront convenient to residents and visitors of this coastal community. The shop is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, and Sunday 12 PM to 5 PM, making it accessible for those needing quick access to pawn services or jewelry purchases during the week or weekend.

This Atlantic Beach location provides full pawn shop services including collateral-based loans, gold and precious metal buying, jewelry sales, and electronics transactions. Call 904-247-7772 to inquire about current rates, items in stock, or to ask about bringing in items for evaluation or loan consideration.

For Atlantic Beach residents seeking immediate cash against jewelry or valuables, this location provides a straightforward pawn solution. Bring valid identification and be prepared to discuss the item's condition and value. Value Pawn & Jewelry focuses on fair evaluations and transparent in-person transactions.
pros: Part of the EZPAWN chain — standardized pricing practices and an online account management portal
Instant Quote tool lets customers get electronics estimates online before visiting the store
EZ+ Rewards Program earns points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments
"Take Today" financing option for purchases, with terms up to 12+ months depending on credit
Open seven days a week including Sundays (12–5 PM) with extended weekday hours to 7 PM
On-site precious metal testing to help ensure accurate gold and diamond valuations
cons: Pawn loans are subject to fees and terms not disclosed on the website — effective APRs on pawn loans are typically very high
"Take Today" installment financing is through unnamed third-party companies, so rates and terms are opaque until in-store
Loan amounts are limited to the appraised value of collateral, which the store determines unilaterally
Online payments not available in some states; limited self-service outside of EZPAWN's supported regions
All retail merchandise is pre-owned — no manufacturer warranties unless a separate Protection Plan is purchased
best_for: Consumers who need fast cash and own electronics, jewelry, tools, or other valuables to use as collateral
Shoppers seeking brand-name electronics, jewelry, or tools at 25–70% below retail prices
Individuals with no bank account or poor credit who cannot qualify for conventional short-term loans
Sellers looking to liquidate gold or diamond jewelry quickly at a tested, assessed price
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for Miami-area consumers who need immediate cash against personal property or want discounted pre-owned merchandise, especially those without access to traditional credit. The main caveat is that pawn loan fees are not disclosed online and are typically equivalent to triple-digit APRs — borrowers should treat this as a last resort for short-term cash needs, not a low-cost credit product.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, cash on the spot)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying (any weight or karat)
Pre-owned brand-name retail merchandise (electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming, handbags, sneakers)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Instant Quote tool for electronics (online, no visit required)
EZ+ Rewards Program (points on transactions, online account management)
"Take Today" third-party installment financing (up to 12+ months, credit-based)
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and merchandise
meta_description: Value Pawn & Jewelry at 1099 Atlantic Blvd, Atlantic Beach, FL. Fast cash loans, gold buying, and jewelry sales.
